notes: One-click in-app updates: connect a single Cloudflare API token once (Account Analytics: Read + Workers Scripts: Edit) and the panel shows live Worker usage AND self-updates with one click — no token re-entry, no manual redeploy; the Update panel now reflects "Cloudflare connected" and an older worker is told to deploy v3.8.0 once. Also in 3.8.0: Disguise mode (move panel/login/subscription to secret paths; protocol strings encoded out of the build); per-ISP clean-IP pool (per-carrier files auto-served by operator); request-count quota backstop; multi-SOCKS5 with client failover + static/pinned exit IP + daily/weekly auto-rotation; Clash/FlClash (mihomo) import fix; KV-budget fix (D1 is now primary — clears the 'KV request ended' error); monthly bandwidth cap + auto-pause; Telegram bot back-buttons + live usage; full Farsi/English localization. WebSocket stays the default transport (XHTTP opt-in for Xray-core apps; gRPC retired).
